primary_source: Wildberger, N. J. (2005). Divine Proportions: Rational Trigonometry to Universal Geometry. Wild Egg Books. ISBN 978-0-9757492-0-8.
title: QA RT Quadrance Orbit Divisibility Cert fixture schema [283]
description: Fixtures for qa_rt_quadrance_orbit_cert_v1. Each fixture specifies a QA direction pair (b,e), the quadrance G=b^2+e^2, the orbit family, and the expected 3-adic valuation v3(G). Claim: v3(G) = 2*v3(gcd(b,e)) = {0 for cosmos, 2 for satellite, 4 for singularity}.
